zh.Horbury, Wakefield, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾波利
zh.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury於大約1258年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾霍爾波利。她於1274年與Nicholas De Wortley在英國越可爾沃特利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury于大约1258年出生在英国英格兰越可爾霍爾波利。她于1274年与Nicholas De Wortley在英国越可爾沃特利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Horbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Horbury in Wakefield (WR Yorks).

variants.name: Aubrey
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name Albry, Aubry, or Aubery, a borrowing of Old French Alberi, Aubri (from ancient Germanic Alberic, which is composed of the elements alb ‘elf’ and ric ‘powerful’).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Albrey, Aubrey, a borrowing from Old French Albree, Aubree, Auberee (from ancient Germanic Albrad(a)).

English: variant of Abery, a habitational name from a local pronunciation of Avebury, Wiltshire. The placename derives from Old English burh ‘stronghold, fortified place’, with an uncertain first element, possibly the Old English personal name Afa.

variants.name: Holberry
meanings: English: variant of   Horbury  ; see   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  .

variants.name: Horberry
meanings: English: variant spelling of   Horbury   or   Aubrey  .

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

en.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury was born about 1258, in Horbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married Nicholas De Wortley in 1274, in Wortley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury est née environ 1258, à Horbury, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé Nicholas De Wortley en 1274, à Wortley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury wurde um 1258 in Horbury, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Sie hat 1274 in Wortley, Yorkshire, England Nicholas De Wortley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady De Horburyは約1258年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアホールブリーで生まれた。1274年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルトリーでNicholas De Wortleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury(은)는 대략 1258년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 호르버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1274년 영국 요르크실르 워틀리에서 Nicholas De Wortley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady De Horbury родилась около 1258 г. в местности хаурбури, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas De Wortley в 1274 г. в местности вортли, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь.
